hooks.command: $d = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $d.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'git commit' -and $cmd -match 'v(\d+\.\d+\.\d+)') { $ver = $matches[1]; $f = 'g:\Mi unidad\Rol\Pathfinder 2ed\Ravnica\docs\index.html'; $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($f, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $n = $c -replace 'const VERSION="[^"]*"', "const VERSION=`"$ver`""; if ($c -ne $n) { [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($f, $n, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); & git -C 'g:\Mi unidad\Rol\Pathfinder 2ed\Ravnica' add 'docs/index.html' } }
